notes: Collection ad in Facebook Feed includes a cover image or video followed by 3 product images. When tapped, opens an Instant Experience (required). Cover image max file size: 30MB; Video max file size: 4GB. Ratio listed as range 1.91:1 to 1:1. Also available on Facebook video feeds, Facebook Reels, Facebook Marketplace, Instagram Feed, Instagram Stories, Instagram Reels, and Instagram Explore placements (specs shown are for Facebook Feed only).
